commit_scope: Expose multi-node mesh topology, typed runtime channels, and native training health on the dashboard, while preserving BML native route proof under full-suite CI.

commands: python3 -m ruff check api/app/routers/hati_mesh.py api/app/routers/models.py api/tests/test_hati_mesh.py api/tests/test_models_learning_dashboard.py
local_validation.notes: The Hati mesh API now stores and returns multi-device display, dwelling, location, and map-position metadata plus channel data type, direction, latency, error, branch-success, infer-error, and model id fields. The dashboard renders a multi-node field map, typed channel characteristics, and model training health derived from native receipts and learning surfaces. Full local PR guard passed after building the local form-kernel-rust release binary required by full API vitality tests; the first runtime web guard attempt hit a transient fonts.gstatic.com fetch failure, and the rerun plus full guard both passed. The CI full-suite mode exposed a BML native Postgres binder gap; the Rust binder now honors explicit SQL casts for text, float, bool, and integer parameters, and the BML idea-family harness has a realistic native route startup window.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed when this evidence was written; PR CI has not completed yet.

deploy_validation.summary: No production deploy requested for this dashboard/API compatibility slice.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The dashboard is no longer shaped around a single Mac node. It can show multiple mesh organs, map/dwelling labels, channel protocols and media characteristics, and model training metrics including branch success, infer error, new cells, and changed cells. Native BML Postgres routes also retain full-suite proof when route parameters are row-derived or JSON numeric values.
test_flows: Local API and web dev servers seeded with three organs and three bidirectional runtime channels.

Browser verification found Mesh observatory, Field map, Channel characteristics, Model training health, Ultra 23, Mac Studio, Wall display, bluetooth-le-gatt, screen-camera-optical, and audio-near-ultrasonic on /dashboard with no browser errors.
CI-flavored BML idea-family and native mutation route side-effect focused tests pass after the Postgres binder cast fix.

phase_gate.gate: Mesh training needs a visible multi-device topology and training-health surface before large continuous training is useful.
phase_gate.next: After PR CI, attach real channel probes and persisted native training receipts so the observatory updates from live mesh evidence rather than seeded local sample rows.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: The dashboard exposed native training receipts and learning direction but did not make the device mesh, transport characteristics, or topology visible.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: The dashboard can inspect multiple organs, dwelling/map labels, bidirectional channel characteristics, protocol/interface/data type metadata, branch success, infer error, new cells, changed cells, and native/oracle training deltas.
new_bands: native Postgres binder explicit SQL-cast coercion
retuned_north_star: show the whole mesh instead of assuming a single Mac node
make Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, audio, video, screen, loopback, and other channels inspectable as first-class runtime paths
surface model health beside topology so route choice can learn from branch success, inference error, volume, latency, and trust
connect live probes and continuous training receipts so mesh visibility becomes operational, not decorative
